creator: freebsd@dckd.nl
text:
(In reply to Bartek Rutkowski from comment #1)

I can't reproduce it on another system unfortunately.

I don't completely understand what the problem here is. The file /usr/src/sys/sys/capsicum.h does exist. 
That file does not exist on an install of 9.3 that I have, and the port builds fine there.
